title: Job Vacancies at Primebuild & Allied Solutions Limited
content:
Primebuild & Allied Solutions Limited is a dynamic and innovative company dedicated to providing top-notch services in various sectors. Our business focus encompasses sales and distributionof quality paint products, interior decorations, general procurement, construction, automobile services, supply of office equipment and furniture, and ICT solutions. We are committed to delivering excellence and creating value for our clients through our comprehensive range of services.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Office Admin / Indoor Sales Consultant

Job Locations: Yaba, Onike, Akoka, Ebute Meta - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Office Admin & Indoor Sales Consultant is responsible for managing day to day office operations, providing excellent customer support, and handling basic digital marketing activities.
	This role requires strong organizational skills, effective communication, and the ability to multi-task.
	The ideal candidate will also have experience in social media management and digital marketing to help promote the Outlet’s paint products online.


Key Responsibilities
Office Administration:


	Manage office supplies, equipment, and maintenance of to ensure a well-organize and efficient work environment.
	Handling administrative tasks such as filing, data entry, scheduling meetings, and maintain office records.
	Assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, and correspondence.
	Coordinate with vendors and service providers for office-related needs.


Customer Support:


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone call, email and social media promptly and professionally.
	Assist customers with product information, order processing and resolving any issues or complaints.
	Maintain a customer database, ensuring all information is up to date and accurate.
	Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction and encourage repeat business.


Digital Marketing and Social Media Management:


	Assist in the development and implementation of digital marketing strategies to promote paint products online.
	Manage the outlet’s social media accounts, including content creation, posting and engagement with followers.
	Monitor and analyze social media performance, providing reports on metrics such as engagement reach and conversion.
	Assist in updating and maintaining the outlet’s websites, ensuring content is current and relevant
	Support email marketing campaigns by creating newsletters and managing distribution lists.


Sales Support:


	Provide administrative support to the sales team, including preparing sales materials, and managing schedules.
	Assist in the coordination of promotional events, exhibitions, and other marketing activities.
	Process sales orders, invoices, and payments, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.
	Generate leads and close sales through social media platforms and working customers.


Communication & Coordination:


	Serve as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and employees, ensuring a positive and professional image of the outlet.
	Coordinate communication between different departments to ensure smooth operations
	Assist in organizing outlet meetings, training sessions, and events.


Compliance & Documentation:


	Ensure compliance with company policies and procedures in all administrative staff.
	Maintain and organize outlet documents, ensuring confidentiality and security of sensitive information.


Qualification & Requirements


	Experience: 2-4 years of experience in office administration, customer support, and digital marketing.


Skills:


	Strong Organizational & time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel and PowerPoint).
	Experience with social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn) and email marketing software.
	Ability to multitask and handle multiple responsibilities efficiently.


Benefits


	Salary: Very attractive.
	Commission on sales.
	Pension.
	HMO.
	Group Life.


Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Office Assistant

Job Location: Yaba / Ebute Meta / Jibowu / Akoka - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reporting Line: Reports directly to the Outlet Manager or any designated supervisor.

Job Summary


	The Office Assistant is responsible for providing general support services to ensure the smooth day-to-day operation of the office, showroom, and warehouse.
	The role involves cleaning, administrative support, stock handling, and other janitorial duties as assigned.


Key Responsibilities


	Carry out daily cleaning and maintenance of office premises, showroom, restrooms, and surrounding areas.
	Assist in running official errands and delivering documents as directed by management or staff.
	Photocopy, print, scan, and file documents when required.
	Operate the paint tinting machine in accordance with company procedures and safety guidelines.
	Arrange and organize products in the showroom and storage areas to ensure neatness and easy accessibility.
	Assist in the offloading, loading, and movement of products and materials within the premises.
	Support stock handling and inventory organization in the warehouse.
	Ensure proper disposal of waste and maintain a clean working environment at all times.
	Report any maintenance issues, equipment faults, or safety concerns to management.
	Perform any other administrative, operational, or janitorial duties assigned by management.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE / WAEC qualification.
	Ability to read and write effectively.
	Physically fit and capable of handling manual tasks.
	Good attitude, honesty, and willingness to learn.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Sales Executive

Job Locations: Ikeja, Ogudu, and Isheri Magodo - Lagos

Job Summary


	The Sales Executive will be responsible for driving sales and achieving revenue targets within the assigned location for the outlet’s paint products. This role requires the individual to manage and expand relationships with existing customers while actively seeking new business opportunities.
	The Sales Executive will be key in promoting and selling paint products to customers, including contractors, developers, retail outlets and individual customers.


Key Responsibilities
Sales & Revenue generation:


	Achieve sales targets and revenue goals set by the outlet
	Identify new sales opportunities within the assigned locations and convert leads into customers
	Manage and expand relationships with existing and potential customers to increase sales volumes


Market Development:


	Conduct market research to understand customer needs, market trend and competitors’ activities
	Develop and implement strategies to increase market share and brand presence in the state
	Attend industry events, exhibitions, and trade shows to promote products and identify potential business opportunities.


Customer Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain strong relationships with customers, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction
	Provide technical advise and product recommendations to customers based on their needs and requirements.
	Handle customer complaints and queries promptly, ensuring effective resolution


Sales Planning & Reporting:


	Prepare and execute sales plans and strategies to achieve the set goals targets.
	Provide regular sales reports, forecast and market feedbacks to Outlet Manager/Director.
	Monitor inventory level at Agent shops to ensure product availability


Training & Development:


	Train outlet Agents on product knowledge, sales techniques and outlet policies
	Stay updated on industry trends, new products, and best practices in sales


Operation Support:


	Work closely with the logistics and Indoor Sales Consultant teams to ensure timely delivery of products to customers
	Assist in timely and accurate payment processing


Compliance & Ethics:


	Ensure compliance with outlet policies, procedures and ethical standards
	Adhere to all legal and regulatory requirements related to the sale and distribution of paint products in Nigeria.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Education: B.Sc./HND/OND in Business Administration, Marketing, Sales or a related field.
	Experience: Minimum of 3 years of sales experience in the paint industry, building material or a related field.


Skills:


	Strong sales and negotiation skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Good organization and time management skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Candidate with a driving experience is an added advantage
	Knowledge of Lagos routes will be an added advantage
	The ideal candidate must reside in Lagos and must know how to drive.


Application Closing Date: 15th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Cross River
Reports to: Accountant / Finance Supervisor

Main Functions


	The Cashier will be responsible for handling customer payments, processing transactions accurately, and maintaining proper cash records within the organization.
	The role requires excellent customer service skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced hospitality environment.


Role Responsibilities
Transaction Processing:


	Receive and process customer payments accurately.
	Issue receipts and maintain proper transaction records.
	Balance cash registers and reconcile daily sales.
	Handle POS systems and payment platforms efficiently.


Customer Service:


	Attend to customers professionally and courteously.
	Respond to customer inquiries regarding payments and transactions.
	Maintain a positive and welcoming attitude.


Financial Accountability:


	Ensure accuracy in cash handling and transaction processing.
	Report discrepancies and operational issues promptly.
	Maintain confidentiality and accountability for financial transactions.


Operational Support:


	Support restaurant, bar, and front desk operations where necessary.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of cashier stations.
	Follow company financial and operational procedures.


Qualifications and Requirements
Education and Certifications:


	OND, HND, or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Business Administration, or related discipline.


Experience:


	1&ndash;3 years of experience as a cashier or in a related role.
	Must have relevant experience in hospitality, restaurant, lounge, supermarket, or retail operations.


Skills
Financial and Technical Skills:


	Basic accounting and numerical skills.
	Proficiency in POS systems and Microsoft Office tools.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.


Communication and Customer Service Skills:


	Excellent customer service and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.
	Honest, reliable, and professional.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@domeoresources.org using &quot;Cashier &ndash; Calabar&quot; as the subject of the email.

Cashier Job at Domeo Resources International (DRI)




        
    

        
        Domeo Resources International (DRI) is a prolific organisation which proffers HR and Management Consultancy solutions premised on excellence and innovation. DRI analyses various organisational problems, develops improvement plans, deploys those plans and monitors the plans to ensure improved organisational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Cross River
Reports to: Accountant / Finance Supervisor

Main Functions
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Cashier will be responsible for handling customer payments, processing transactions accurately, and maintaining proper cash records within the organization.
	The role requires excellent customer service skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced hospitality environment.


Role Responsibilities
Transaction Processing:


	Receive and process customer payments accurately.
	Issue receipts and maintain proper transaction records.
	Balance cash registers and reconcile daily sales.
	Handle POS systems and payment platforms efficiently.


Customer Service:


	Attend to customers professionally and courteously.
	Respond to customer inquiries regarding payments and transactions.
	Maintain a positive and welcoming attitude.


Financial Accountability:


	Ensure accuracy in cash handling and transaction processing.
	Report discrepancies and operational issues promptly.
	Maintain confidentiality and accountability for financial transactions.


Operational Support:


	Support restaurant, bar, and front desk operations where necessary.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of cashier stations.
	Follow company financial and operational procedures.


Qualifications and Requirements
Education and Certifications:


	OND, HND, or Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Business Administration, or related discipline.


Experience:


	1–3 years of experience as a cashier or in a related role.
	Must have relevant experience in hospitality, restaurant, lounge, supermarket, or retail operations.


Skills
Financial and Technical Skills:


	Basic accounting and numerical skills.
	Proficiency in POS systems and Microsoft Office tools.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.


Communication and Customer Service Skills:


	Excellent customer service and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.
	Honest, reliable, and professional.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Cashier – Calabar" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Codelabprojects Nigeria Limited
content:
Codelabprojects Nigeria Limited is a tech Company offering a range of digital solutions and services tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Our services include Web and Mobile Application Development, Business and IT Solutions, Digital Marketing, Search Engine Optimization, Website/E-commerce, Branding and Print solutions, among others.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Digital Marketing & Cold Call Agent

Job Location: Sabon-Lugbe, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: On-site

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Codelabprojects Nigeria Limited is seeking a smart, energetic, and highly trainable Digital Marketing & Cold Call Agent to support customer engagement, digital communication, lead generation, and online brand visibility.
	This is an onsite role that combines outbound cold calling, customer engagement, social media support, and digital marketing execution.
	The ideal candidate should be tech-oriented, adaptable, willing to learn quickly, and capable of handling both customer-facing and digital support responsibilities effectively.
	Candidates with a background in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical disciplines are strongly preferred.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective clients and leads professionally and confidently.
	Follow up on leads, inquiries, and customer interactions to drive conversions.
	Support digital marketing campaigns across social media and online platforms.
	Assist in content creation, posting, and engagement on company social media pages.
	Maintain accurate customer records and communication logs.
	Respond to customer inquiries and direct prospects appropriately.
	Assist with graphic design and marketing material creation using tools such as Canva or Adobe tools.
	Support lead generation and online engagement activities.
	Monitor online engagement and help improve customer experience.
	Learn and adapt to company systems, scripts, products, and digital tools.
	Collaborate with operations, marketing, and customer support teams when required.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field preferred.
	NYSC completed or currently serving candidates may apply.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Good spoken and written English.
	Basic understanding of digital marketing and social media platforms.
	Experience in graphic designing using Canva, Adobe Photoshop, CorelDRAW, or similar tools.
	Willingness and ability to be trained in cold calling, customer engagement, digital marketing, and basic design.
	Strong computer literacy and ability to learn new systems quickly.
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Professional attitude with strong persuasion and problem-solving skills.


Key Competencies:


	Communication and persuasion skills
	Trainability and adaptability
	Tech-savviness
	Creativity and design awareness
	Attention to detail
	Time management and organization
	Team collaboration
	Problem-solving mindset.


Important Note:


	This is a fully on-site role in Abuja.
	Only candidates residing within Lugbe, Airport Road, Galadimawa, or nearby areas will be considered.


Benefits


	Salary: N220,000/month (net)
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing technology-driven environment
	Career growth and development opportunities
	Exposure to modern digital tools and business operations
	Performance-based incentives and learning opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 7th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Digital Marketing & Cold Call Agent – Abuja" as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates may also apply using the Quick Apply option where available.

 

 

2.) Executive Assistant (Generalist)

Job Location: Sabon-Lugbe, Airport Road - Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a highly resourceful, tech-savvy, and self-motivated Executive Assistant / Business Generalist to provide high-level support across multiple departments.
	This is a dynamic, cross-functional role for an individual who can think critically, conduct in-depth research, manage data, and coordinate operations effectively.
	The ideal candidate will be comfortable working across operations, strategy, technology, and administrative functions, supporting leadership and driving execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide executive-level support, including scheduling, coordination, and task management.
	Conduct in-depth research, data gathering, and analysis to support business decisions.
	Assist in cross-departmental coordination, ensuring alignment across teams and projects.
	Support operations across multiple units including tech, marketing, and business development.
	Manage and organize data, reports, and documentation for strategic use.
	Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across various projects.
	Assist in developing process improvements and operational efficiency initiatives.
	Prepare presentations, reports, and briefs for internal and external stakeholders.
	Support leadership in executing strategic initiatives and special projects.
	Adapt quickly to different roles and responsibilities as business needs evolve.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering or Computer Science (Minimum: 2:1 or First Class).
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong analytical and research skills with attention to detail.
	High level of tech proficiency and ability to quickly learn new tools and systems.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and coordination skills.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	Experience with data handling, reporting, and problem-solving.
	Proven ability to function across multiple departments effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Resourcefulness and initiative
	Critical thinking and problem-solving
	Strong data and analytical mindset
	Adaptability and flexibility
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.


Salary
N250,000/month (Gross) + Performance Bonuses & Perks.

Benefits:


	Exposure to high-level business operations and strategy
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing, technology-driven environment
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 20th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Executive Assistant / Business Generalist – Precise location in Abuja as the subject of the email.

Note: This is a fully on-site role in Abuja. Only candidates residing within Lugbe, Airport Road, Galadimawa, or nearby areas will be considered.

 

3.) Executive Assistant / Business Generalist

Job Location: Sabon-Lugbe, Airport Road - Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a highly resourceful, tech-savvy, and self-motivated Executive Assistant / Business Generalist to provide high-level support across multiple departments.
	This is a dynamic, cross-functional role for an individual who can think critically, conduct in-depth research, manage data, and coordinate operations effectively. The ideal candidate will be comfortable working across operations, strategy, technology, and administrative functions, supporting leadership and driving execution.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide executive-level support, including scheduling, coordination, and task management.
	Conduct in-depth research, data gathering, and analysis to support business decisions.
	Assist in cross-departmental coordination, ensuring alignment across teams and projects.
	Support operations across multiple units including tech, marketing, and business development.
	Manage and organize data, reports, and documentation for strategic use.
	Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across various projects.
	Assist in developing process improvements and operational efficiency initiatives.
	Prepare presentations, reports, and briefs for internal and external stakeholders.
	Support leadership in executing strategic initiatives and special projects.
	Adapt quickly to different roles and responsibilities as business needs evolve.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or a related technical field (Minimum: 2:1 or First Class).
	Minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong analytical and research skills with attention to detail.
	High level of tech proficiency and ability to quickly learn new tools and systems.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and coordination skills.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and take initiative.
	Experience with data handling, reporting, and problem-solving.
	Proven ability to function across multiple departments effectively.


Key Competencies:


	Resourcefulness and initiative
	Critical thinking and problem-solving
	Strong data and analytical mindset
	Adaptability and flexibility
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.


Salary
N250,000/month (Gross) + Performance Bonuses & Perks.

Benefits:


	Exposure to high-level business operations and strategy
	Opportunity to work in a fast-growing, technology-driven environment
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 31st August, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only candidates residing within Lugbe, Airport Road, Galadimawa, or nearby areas will be considered.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Internal Auditor (Restaurant Experience) Job at Pawa House
content:

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Auditor (Restaurant Experience)",
  "description": "Pawa House, in addition to its spa and fitness business, is also into the hospitality business (restaurant and lounge).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor (Restaurant Experience)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Review system-generated reports daily and flag suspected transactions.
	Review all voids, bad, and cancelled order transactions daily.
	Generate and distribute reports to management as required.
	Review inventory and sales report daily, weekly and monthly.
	Check for compliance with processes and procedures for voiding and cancellation of orders.
	Ensure that the wastage, bad, and damaged reports are carefully reviewed for compliance in terms of documentation, reconciliation to inventory and tracking records.
	Special investigations on issues surrounding bad and cancelled orders.
	Checking to ensure that declared wastage returns are correct and properly documented and signed off.
	Run system reports for edit down transactions on a periodic basis, ., daily, weekly, or monthly. All edited transactions must be reported and flagged for further review.
	Review sales returns for cash shortages/surpluses after banking.
	Ensure all transfer sales are paid into the company account only and reconcile sales at end of the day.
	Examining records, reports, receipts, or other documents and comparing them to company assets and liabilities.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and restaurant experience.&nbsp;


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: officialpawahouse@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Pawa House"
    
  },

}



Internal Auditor (Restaurant Experience) Job at Pawa House




        
    

        
        Pawa House, in addition to its spa and fitness business, is also into the hospitality business (restaurant and lounge).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor (Restaurant Experience)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Review system-generated reports daily and flag suspected transactions.
	Review all voids, bad, and cancelled order transactions daily.
	Generate and distribute reports to management as required.
	Review inventory and sales report daily, weekly and monthly.
	Check for compliance with processes and procedures for voiding and cancellation of orders.
	Ensure that the wastage, bad, and damaged reports are carefully reviewed for compliance in terms of documentation, reconciliation to inventory and tracking records.
	Special investigations on issues surrounding bad and cancelled orders.
	Checking to ensure that declared wastage returns are correct and properly documented and signed off.
	Run system reports for edit down transactions on a periodic basis, ., daily, weekly, or monthly. All edited transactions must be reported and flagged for further review.
	Review sales returns for cash shortages/surpluses after banking.
	Ensure all transfer sales are paid into the company account only and reconcile sales at end of the day.
	Examining records, reports, receipts, or other documents and comparing them to company assets and liabilities.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and restaurant experience. 


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Bookkeeper / Purchase Order Processor Job at AFARI Travels & Tours Limited




        
    

        
        AFARI Travels & Tours Limited - Sustainable Travel Approach with Transforming Experiences! We are a travels & tours packaging company that is committed to providing luxury-styled travel management, consultations and tourism. Our services include tours, visa processing assistance, travel planning, accommodation, airport transfers, international money transfers, ticketing, VIP concierge & charter services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bookkeeper / Purchase Order Processor

Job Location: Lagos

About job
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We need a creative mind to elevate our brand presence and engage our audience through compelling visuals and content.
